summary: Heavy Carnival UK day: maritime recruitment call held this morning, plus inbound on insurance review, Cunard talent pool restructuring (142 candidates), and MLC Vietnam. Finance review with Harold on CTI Group / UNO / BARON books follows. Pipeline active on Alliance Abroad / CIEE South Africa & Thailand trip; Beemok F&B stipend language needs clarification with partner.

Finance Update — CTI Group / UNO / BARON (with Harold)

emails.action: Review release list and coordinate transfer plan with Jordan

emails.subject: CTI Insurances — quotes forwarded to Carnival VP, Legal & Risk
emails.action: Standby for VP/Legal feedback before binding

emails.subject: Re: MLC Vietnam
emails.action: Jordan Eliades to review and respond

emails.action: Clarify stipend language in offer letters with Beemok

emails.subject: Re: Trip to South Africa and Thailand — Alliance Abroad
Commis Chef, Food Runner, Carpenter, Waiter, Public Area Attendant
emails.action: Recruitment team to triage and log in Zoho CRM

actionItems.task: Coordinate response to Amelia on Cunard candidate release — confirm 35 closures and 26 P&O transfers
Reply to Rachel Mann on MLC Vietnam (chain from April 15)
Get written clarification from Beemok on $3.86/hr F&B stipend before candidates sign offers
Progress Alliance Abroad + CIEE South Africa/Thailand sourcing trip — 100 candidates per location
Deliver consolidated CTI Group / UNO / BARON finance view in Zoho Books during 9:30 AM review
Triage 5 inbound candidate resumes (Commis Chef, Food Runner, Carpenter, Waiter, Public Area Attendant)
Follow up on updated POA Letter (sent 4/22) — confirm receipt by Carnival brands

metrics.J-1 CRM activity (24h): data pending — J1 modules returned empty / permission denied
